Defines haptic feedback and "Nudge Nudge" vibration patterns with parameters.


## Files
- **[haptic_feedback.json](haptic_feedback.json.md)**: Defines haptic feedback patterns with parameters for duration, strength, and repeat delay.
- **[nudge_nudge.json](nudge_nudge.json.md)**: Defines vibration patterns and parameters for the "Nudge Nudge" feature.
